pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","p",null,{"children":"ImmortalWrt 是 OpenWrt 的一个第三方分支，主要针对国人用户开发，提供更多的本地化软件包和设备支持。"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["与 OpenWrt 相同，从 ImmortalWrt 25.12 开始，包管理器由 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"opkg"}]," 改为 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"apk"}]," (Alpine Package Keeper)，默认软件源的配置文件路径由 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/opkg/distfeeds.conf"}]," 改为 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apk/repositories.d/distfeeds.list"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"自动替换","children":"自动替换"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["对于 ImmortalWrt 25.12 及以上版本，需选择 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"APK"}],"；对于 ImmortalWrt 24.10 及以下版本，需选择 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"OPKG"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"执行如下命令自动替换："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"选择包管理器","items":[["APK",{"packagemanager":"apk","filepath":"/etc/apk/repositories.d/distfeeds.list"}],["OPKG",{"packagemanager":"opkg","filepath":"/etc/opkg/distfeeds.conf"}]]}],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"手工替换","children":"手工替换"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["登录到路由器，根据版本或包管理器选择编辑 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apk/repositories.d/distfeeds.list"}]," 或 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/opkg/distfeeds.conf"}]," 文件，将源地址 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"https://downloads.immortalwrt.org"}]," 或 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"https://mirrors.vsean.net/openwrt"}]," 替换为："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["然后运行 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"apk update"}]," 或 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"opkg update"}]," 刷新软件包列表。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["您也可以登录 LuCI 后台，进入 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"系统"}]," -> ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"软件包"}]," 页面，点击 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"配置 apk"}]," 或 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"配置 opkg"}]," 并按上述说明完成对源地址的更改。"]}]]}]

compiledTemplates.template-0: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("sed -e 's,https://downloads.immortalwrt.org,");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b(",g' \\");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("    -e 's,https://mirrors.vsean.net/openwrt,");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b(",g' \\");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("    -i.bak ");t.b(t.v(t.f("filepath",c,p,0)));return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
